en.atmosphere: Sleepy residential area, weekday mornings quiet, evenings livelier.
en.landmarks: Decent parks (156k sqm). Nature pockets scattered.
en.food: Limited dining (12 places). Rely on chains and fast food.
en.nightlife: Sparse nightlife. Neighborhood bars only. Early closing.

ja.atmosphere: 住宅地。朝は静か、夜少し人出。
ja.food: 食べ物少ない（12軒）。コンビニ頼り。

ru.atmosphere: Спальный район. Утро тихо, вечер оживлённо.
